title: eclipta procumbens var. brachypoda
intro: Eclipta procumbens var. brachypoda, also known as False Daisy or Eclipta, is a perennial herb native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eclipta procumbens var. brachypoda include reducing stress and anxiety, improving liver function, and promoting hair growth. Eclipta is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used topically in the form of a salve or oil.
